entity.summary: Mixin ecosystem automated-market-maker exchange operated through the ExinSwap application and bot, supporting asset swaps, stablecoin exchange routes, liquidity provision, and liquidity withdrawal.
entity.notes: First-party developer documentation identifies ExinSwap as Exin's AMM trading platform and documents swaps, stablecoin routes, liquidity operations, bot-based execution, and application APIs. A current volume adapter continues to query the ExinSwap application API for daily trading volume.

evidence.title: ExinSwap developer documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies ExinSwap as an automated-market-maker trading platform in the Mixin ecosystem and documents swaps, stablecoin support, trade routing, liquidity deposits and withdrawals, bot execution, and application APIs.

evidence.title: ExinSwap volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter queries the ExinSwap application API for daily Mixin exchange volume and preserves the active application endpoint.
